Render a diagnostic set as XML

Source: R/reporter_xml.R
reporter_xml.Rd

Schema:

<rtrace-report schemaVersion="1">
  <summary error="1" warning="2" info="0"/>
  <diagnostics>
    <diagnostic ruleId="..." severity="error" file="..." line="1" column="2">
      <message>...</message>
      <suggestion>...</suggestion>
    </diagnostic>
  </diagnostics>
</rtrace-report>

line/column attributes are omitted when unknown. <suggestion> is omitted when the diagnostic has none. Built with xml2, which handles attribute/text escaping, so this reporter requires the xml2 package (Suggests, not a hard dependency — see ADR 0002 on keeping the core dependency footprint light).

Usage

reporter_xml(diagnostics)

Arguments

diagnostics

An rtrace_diagnostic_set.

Value

Character scalar XML text.

On this page
